info.title: Hummingbot Gateway
info.description: API endpoints for interacting with DEXs and blockchains

get.description: Get configuration settings. Returns all configurations if no parameters are specified. Use namespace to get a specific config (e.g., server, ethereum-mainnet, solana-mainnet-beta, uniswap).

post.description: Update a specific configuration value

get.description: Returns a list of available blockchain networks supported by Gateway.
Returns a list of available DEX connectors and their supported blockchain networks.
Returns a list of all configuration namespaces available in Gateway.
Get all wallets across different chains

walletAddresses.description: List of regular wallet addresses with private keys

items.description: Wallet address (Ethereum format: 0x... or Solana format: base58)
Wallet address (Ethereum format: 0x... or Solana format: base58)

post.description: Add a new wallet using a private key

setDefault.description: Set this wallet as the default for the chain

address.description: The wallet address that was added

post.description: Add a hardware wallet

address.description: Hardware wallet address to add (must exist on connected Ledger device)

setDefault.description: Set this wallet as the default for the chain

address.description: The hardware wallet address that was added

publicKey.description: Public key of the hardware wallet

delete.description: Remove a wallet by its address (automatically detects wallet type)

message.description: Success message indicating wallet type removed

post.description: Set a wallet as default for a specific chain

chain.description: Blockchain to set default wallet for

address.description: Wallet address to set as default

get.description: Get a specific token by symbol or address

name.description: The full name of the token

decimals.description: The number of decimals the token uses

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp (ms) when data was fetched

get.description: Get token information with market data from GeckoTerminal by address

parameters.name: chainNetwork
parameters.description: Chain and network in format: chain-network (e.g., solana-mainnet-beta, ethereum-mainnet)

name.description: The full name of the token

decimals.description: The number of decimals the token uses

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp (ms) when data was fetched
Unix timestamp (ms) when data was fetched

get.description: List tokens from token lists with optional filtering

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search term for filtering tokens by symbol or name

name.description: The full name of the token

decimals.description: The number of decimals the token uses

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp (ms) when data was fetched

post.description: Add a new token to a token list

name.description: The full name of the token

decimals.description: The number of decimals the token uses

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp (ms) when data was fetched

parameters.description: Chain and network in format: chain-network (e.g., solana-mainnet-beta, ethereum-mainnet)

name.description: The full name of the token

decimals.description: The number of decimals the token uses

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp (ms) when data was fetched

get.description: Get a specific pool by trading pair
Get detailed pool information by address from GeckoTerminal

parameters.name: chainNetwork
parameters.description: Chain and network in format: chain-network (e.g., solana-mainnet-beta, ethereum-mainnet)

priceNative.description: Base token price in quote token

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp (ms) when data was fetched

get.description: Find pools for a token pair from GeckoTerminal

parameters.name: chainNetwork
parameters.description: Chain and network in format: chain-network (e.g., solana-mainnet-beta, ethereum-mainnet)

parameters.name: connector
parameters.description: Filter by connector name (e.g., raydium, meteora, uniswap, pancakeswap, pancakeswap-sol)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by pool type: clmm (v3-style concentrated liquidity) or amm (v2-style)

parameters.name: tokenA
parameters.description: First token symbol or contract address (optional - for filtering by token pair)

parameters.name: tokenB
parameters.description: Second token symbol or contract address (optional - for filtering by token pair)

parameters.name: pages
parameters.description: Number of pages to fetch from GeckoTerminal (1-10, default: 10)

priceNative.description: Base token price in quote token

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp (ms) when data was fetched

get.description: List all pools for a connector, optionally filtered by network, type, or search term

parameters.name: network
parameters.description: Optional: filter by network (mainnet, mainnet-beta, etc)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Optional: search by token symbol or address

post.description: Add a new pool

feePct.description: Pool fee percentage (optional - fetched from pool-info if not provided)

post.description: Find pool from GeckoTerminal and save it to the pool list

parameters.name: chainNetwork
parameters.description: Chain and network in format: chain-network (e.g., solana-mainnet-beta, ethereum-mainnet)

priceNative.description: Base token price in quote token

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp (ms) when data was fetched

get.description: Get a swap quote for any supported chain

parameters.name: chainNetwork
parameters.description: Chain and network in format: chain-network (e.g., solana-mainnet-beta, ethereum-mainnet, ethereum-polygon)

parameters.name: connector
parameters.description: Connector to use in format: connector/type (e.g., jupiter/router, raydium/amm, uniswap/clmm). If not provided, uses network's configured swapProvider

parameters.name: baseToken
parameters.description: Symbol or address of the base token

parameters.name: quoteToken
parameters.description: Symbol or address of the quote token

tokenIn.description: Address of the token being swapped from

tokenOut.description: Address of the token being swapped to

amountIn.description: Amount of tokenIn to be swapped

amountOut.description: Expected amount of tokenOut to receive

price.description: Exchange rate between tokenIn and tokenOut

minAmountOut.description: Minimum amount of tokenOut that will be accepted

maxAmountIn.description: Maximum amount of tokenIn that will be spent

post.description: Execute a swap on any supported chain

walletAddress.description: Wallet address to execute swap from

chainNetwork.description: Chain and network in format: chain-network (e.g., solana-mainnet-beta, ethereum-mainnet, ethereum-polygon)

connector.description: Connector to use in format: connector/type (e.g., jupiter/router, raydium/amm, uniswap/clmm). If not provided, uses network's configured swapProvider

baseToken.description: Symbol or address of the base token

quoteToken.description: Symbol or address of the quote token

tokenIn.description: Address of the token swapped from

tokenOut.description: Address of the token swapped to

baseTokenBalanceChange.description: Change in base token balance (negative for decrease)

quoteTokenBalanceChange.description: Change in quote token balance (negative for decrease)

get.description: Get Solana network status
Estimate gas prices for Solana transactions

post.description: Get token balances for a Solana address. Only returns tokens in the network's token list. If no tokens specified or empty array provided, returns non-zero balances for tokens from the token list that are found in the wallet (includes SOL even if zero). If specific tokens are requested, returns those exact tokens with their balances, including zeros.

tokens.description: A list of token symbols (SOL, USDC, BONK) from the network's token list. Only tokens in the token list will be returned. An empty array is treated the same as if the parameter was not provided, returning only non-zero balances (with the exception of SOL).

200.description: Token balances for the specified address (only tokens in token list)

schema.description: Token balances for the specified address (only tokens in token list)

post.description: Poll for the status of a Solana transaction

tokens.description: Tokens to track balance changes for

walletAddress.description: Wallet address to track balance changes for

tokenBalanceChanges.description: Dictionary of token balance changes keyed by token input value (symbol or address)

post.description: Wrap SOL to WSOL (Wrapped SOL)

amount.description: The amount of SOL to wrap (in SOL, not lamports)

post.description: Unwrap WSOL to SOL. Note: This closes the entire WSOL account, returning all WSOL as SOL.

amount.description: The amount of WSOL to unwrap (in SOL, not lamports). If not provided, unwraps all WSOL.

get.description: Get Ethereum chain status
Estimate gas prices for Ethereum transactions

post.description: Get Ethereum balances. If no tokens specified or empty array provided, returns native token (ETH) and only non-zero balances for tokens from the token list. If specific tokens are requested, returns those exact tokens with their balances, including zeros.

tokens.description: A list of token symbols (ETH, USDC, WETH) or token addresses. Both formats are accepted and will be automatically detected. An empty array is treated the same as if the parameter was not provided, returning only non-zero balances (with the exception of ETH).

post.description: Poll Ethereum transaction status

tokenBalanceChanges.description: Dictionary of token balance changes keyed by token input value (symbol or address)

post.description: Get token allowances

spender.description: Connector name (e.g., uniswap/clmm, uniswap/amm, 0x/router) or contract address

tokens.description: Array of token symbols or addresses

post.description: Approve token spending

spender.description: Connector name (e.g., uniswap/clmm, uniswap/amm, 0x/router) contract address

amount.description: The amount to approve. If not provided, defaults to maximum amount (unlimited approval).

post.description: Wrap native token to wrapped token (e.g., ETH to WETH, BNB to WBNB)

amount.description: The amount of native token to wrap (e.g., ETH, BNB, AVAX)

post.description: Unwrap wrapped token to native token (e.g., WETH to ETH, WBNB to BNB)

amount.description: The amount of wrapped token to unwrap (e.g., WETH, WBNB, WAVAX)

post.description: Get Cosmos balances. If no tokens specified or empty array provided, returns native token (OSMO) and only non-zero balances for tokens from the token list. If specific tokens are requested, returns those exact tokens with their balances, including zeros.

tokens.description: A list of token symbols or addresses. An empty array is treated the same as if the parameter was not provided, returning only non-zero balances plus the native token.

fetchAll.description: fetch all tokens in wallet, not just those in token list (default: false)

get.description: Get cosmos chain status

post.description: Estimate gas prices for Cosmos transactions
Poll Cosmos transaction status

tokens.description: Array of token symbols or addresses for balance change calculation

walletAddress.description: Wallet address for balance change calculation (required if tokens provided)

tokenBalanceChanges.description: Dictionary of token balance changes keyed by token input value (symbol or address)

get.description: Get Cosmos/Osmosis tokens
Get an executable swap quote from Jupiter

parameters.name: baseToken
parameters.description: Solana token symbol or address to determine swap direction

parameters.name: quoteToken
parameters.description: The other Solana token symbol or address in the pair

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Amount of base token to trade

parameters.name: side
parameters.description: Trade direction - BUY means buying base token with quote token, SELL means selling base token for quote token

parameters.name: restrictIntermediateTokens
parameters.description: Restrict routing through highly liquid intermediate tokens only for better price and stability

parameters.name: onlyDirectRoutes
parameters.description: Restrict routing to only go through 1 market

tokenIn.description: Address of the token being swapped from

tokenOut.description: Address of the token being swapped to

amountIn.description: Amount of tokenIn to be swapped

amountOut.description: Expected amount of tokenOut to receive

price.description: Exchange rate between tokenIn and tokenOut

minAmountOut.description: Minimum amount of tokenOut that will be accepted

maxAmountIn.description: Maximum amount of tokenIn that will be spent

inputMint.description: Solana mint address of input token

outputMint.description: Solana mint address of output token

outAmount.description: Expected output amount in token decimals

otherAmountThreshold.description: Minimum output amount based on slippage

routePlan.description: Detailed routing plan through various markets

contextSlot.description: Solana slot used for quote calculation

timeTaken.description: Time taken to generate quote in milliseconds

approximation.description: Indicates if ExactIn approximation was used when ExactOut route was not available

post.description: Execute a previously fetched quote from Jupiter

walletAddress.description: Solana wallet address that will execute the swap

quoteId.description: ID of the Jupiter quote to execute

priorityLevel.description: Priority level for Solana transaction processing

maxLamports.description: Maximum priority fee in lamports for Solana transaction

tokenIn.description: Address of the token swapped from

tokenOut.description: Address of the token swapped to

baseTokenBalanceChange.description: Change in base token balance (negative for decrease)

quoteTokenBalanceChange.description: Change in quote token balance (negative for decrease)

post.description: Quote and execute a token swap on Jupiter in one step

walletAddress.description: Solana wallet address that will execute the swap

baseToken.description: Solana token symbol or address to determine swap direction

quoteToken.description: The other Solana token symbol or address in the pair

amount.description: Amount of base token to trade

side.description: Trade direction - BUY means buying base token with quote token, SELL means selling base token for quote token

restrictIntermediateTokens.description: Restrict routing through highly liquid intermediate tokens only for better price and stability

onlyDirectRoutes.description: Restrict routing to only go through 1 market

priorityLevel.description: Priority level for Solana transaction processing

maxLamports.description: Maximum priority fee in lamports for Solana transaction

tokenIn.description: Address of the token swapped from

tokenOut.description: Address of the token swapped to

baseTokenBalanceChange.description: Change in base token balance (negative for decrease)

quoteTokenBalanceChange.description: Change in quote token balance (negative for decrease)

get.description: Get a swap quote from 0x. Use indicativePrice=true for price discovery only, or false/undefined for executable quotes

parameters.name: baseToken
parameters.description: First token in the trading pair

parameters.name: quoteToken
parameters.description: Second token in the trading pair

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Amount of base token to trade

parameters.name: side
parameters.description: Trade direction - BUY means buying base token with quote token, SELL means selling base token for quote token

parameters.name: indicativePrice
parameters.description: If true, returns indicative pricing only (no commitment). If false, returns firm quote ready for execution

parameters.name: takerAddress
parameters.description: Ethereum wallet address that will execute the swap (optional for quotes)

tokenIn.description: Address of the token being swapped from

tokenOut.description: Address of the token being swapped to

amountIn.description: Amount of tokenIn to be swapped

amountOut.description: Expected amount of tokenOut to receive

price.description: Exchange rate between tokenIn and tokenOut

minAmountOut.description: Minimum amount of tokenOut that will be accepted

maxAmountIn.description: Maximum amount of tokenIn that will be spent

expirationTime.description: Unix timestamp when this quote expires (only for firm quotes)

gasEstimate.description: Estimated gas required for the swap

sources.description: Liquidity sources used for this quote

allowanceTarget.description: Contract address that needs token approval

to.description: Contract address to send transaction to

value.description: ETH value to send with transaction

post.description: Execute a previously fetched quote from 0x

walletAddress.description: Wallet address that will execute the swap

quoteId.description: ID of the quote to execute

gasPrice.description: Gas price in wei for the transaction

maxGas.description: Maximum gas limit for the transaction

tokenIn.description: Address of the token swapped from

tokenOut.description: Address of the token swapped to

baseTokenBalanceChange.description: Change in base token balance (negative for decrease)

quoteTokenBalanceChange.description: Change in quote token balance (negative for decrease)

post.description: Quote and execute a token swap on 0x in one step

walletAddress.description: Wallet address that will execute the swap

quoteToken.description: The other token in the pair

amount.description: Amount of base token to trade

side.description: Trade direction - BUY means buying base token with quote token, SELL means selling base token for quote token

gasPrice.description: Gas price in wei for the transaction

maxGas.description: Maximum gas limit for the transaction

tokenIn.description: Address of the token swapped from

tokenOut.description: Address of the token swapped to
